debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (quickSort α inst✝ l)

failed_attempts:
classical
  induction l with
  | nil =>
    simp [quickSort]
  | cons pivot l ih =>
    have ih₁ := count_eq_count_quickSort (smaller pivot l) x
    have ih₂ := count_eq_count_quickSort (larger pivot l) x
    simp [quickSort, count_sum_above_below_pivot, ih₁, ih₂, List.count_append, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm,
      Nat.add_comm]

  | cons pivot l ih =>
    simp [quickSort, ih, count_sum_above_below_pivot, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm]
